sqlCommands.descr: insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data10',Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,'' as Crcy,ACD,Source, 0 as Doc_Amt, 0 as LC_Amt, round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF_Canada where source = 'R66' and YearPeriod > '201012' and YearPeriod <= '201512' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,GL,'' as Crcy,ACD,Source, 0 as Doc_Amt, 0 as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control_Canada where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201012' and YearPeriod <= '201512' and (GL like '148%' or GL like '23%') and not GL like '232%' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source union all select Co,(CASE WHEN (Co = '2002' AND GL = '2310001' AND PC = '2202FR0347') THEN '2310000' ELSE GL END) as GL,Crcy,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(-LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF_Canada where source = 'R66' and YearPeriod > '201512' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,(CASE WHEN (Co = '2002' AND GL = '2310001' AND PC = '2202FR0347') THEN '2310000' ELSE GL END) as GL,Crcy,ACD,Source,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control_Canada where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201512' and (GL like '148%' or GL like '23%') and not GL like '232%' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG_CAD ')

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,PC,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data3',Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,(case when GL_Grp = 'RCR IF' then 'RCR' else GL_GRP end) as GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(-LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_LIC where  source = 'R64' and YearPeriod > '202112' GROUP BY Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source union all select Co,(case when GL like '%999%' then coalesce(coalesce(y.Field1,z.Field1),GL) + 'x' else  coalesce(coalesce(y.Field1,z.Field1),GL) end) as GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -Doc_QTD else Doc_QTD end)),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -LC_QTD else LC_QTD end)),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -LC2_QTD else LC2_QTD end)),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control x left join [FX_Recon].dbo.Misc_Tables y on substring(GL,1,4) = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'LIC' left join [FX_Recon].dbo.Misc_Tables z on substring(GL,1,3) = z.Descr and z.Table_ID = 'IR17' and z.ID = 'LIC' and y.Field1 is NULL where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '202112' and (Substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','15','20','21','18','40','54') or Substring(GL,1,3) in ('283','284','287')) and not substring(GL,1,3) in ('148','149','208','209','182') GROUP BY Co,y.Field1,z.Field1,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,GL) a GROUP BY Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ')

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,BusCat,Amt1,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data4',Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Doc_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt, round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt, round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF where source = 'R65' and YearPeriod > '201512' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_Amt, round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201512' and (GL like '131%' or GL like '22%' or GL like '282%') and not GL like '2822%' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ')

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data5',Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(-LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF where source = 'R66' and YearPeriod > '201512' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201512' and (GL like '148%' or GL like '23%') and not GL like '232%' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ')
update TransX set Contract = '56', TTY = '841' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2006' and PC = '4070200195'
update TransX set Contract = '536', PC = '4070100087', TTY = '843' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2007' and PC in ('4070100087','4070200194')
update TransX set TTY = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5519900'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, BusCat, Contract,UWYR, TTY, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, BusCat, Contract,UWYR, TTY, 'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, BusCat, Contract,UWYR,TTY)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and flex1 is null

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, PK, BusCat, Contract,UWYR, TTY) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, '40' as PK, BusCat, Contract,UWYR, TTY from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, PK, BusCat, Contract,UWYR, TTY) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, '50' as PK, BusCat, Contract,UWYR, TTY from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,PC,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data11',Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,(case when GL_Grp = 'RCR IF' then 'RCR' else GL_GRP end) as GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(-LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_LIC where source = 'R64' and YearPeriod > '201012' GROUP BY Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source union all select Co,(case when GL like '%999%' then coalesce(coalesce(y.Field1,z.Field1),GL) + 'x' else  coalesce(coalesce(y.Field1,z.Field1),GL) end) as GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -Doc_QTD else Doc_QTD end)),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -LC_QTD else LC_QTD end)),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -LC2_QTD else LC2_QTD end)),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control x left join IR17_Tables y on substring(GL,1,4) = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'LIC' left join IR17_Tables z on substring(GL,1,3) = z.Descr and z.Table_ID = 'IR17' and z.ID = 'LIC' and y.Field1 is NULL where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201012' and (Substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','15','20','21','18','40','54') or Substring(GL,1,3) in ('283','284','287')) and not substring(GL,1,3) in ('148','149','208','209','182') GROUP BY Co,y.Field1,z.Field1,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,GL) a GROUP BY Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD ) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) AND NOT GL_Grp IN ('DAC','UPR') and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ')

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6) (select '[batchID]-data8',Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD from (select Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_QTD,round(sum(Doc_ITD),2) as Doc_ITD,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_QTD,round(sum(LC_ITD),2) as LC_ITD,round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_QTD,round(sum(LC2_ITD),2) as LC2_ITD from (select Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_QTD,round(sum(-Doc_ITD),2) as Doc_ITD,round(sum(-LC_QTD),2) as LC_QTD,round(sum(-LC_ITD),2) as LC_ITD,round(sum(-LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_QTD,round(sum(-LC2_ITD),2) as LC2_ITD from IR17_Other where source = 'R69' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source union all select Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_QTD,round(sum(Doc_ITD),2) as Doc_ITD,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_QTD,round(sum(LC_ITD),2) as LC_ITD,round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_QTD,round(sum(LC2_ITD),2) as LC2_ITD from IR17_Control where source = 'R63' and GL in ('nothing') GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD) b where (abs(Doc_QTD) > 1 or abs(Doc_ITD) > 1 or abs(LC_QTD) > 1 or abs(LC_ITD) > 1 or abs(LC2_QTD) > 1 or abs(LC2_ITD) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ')

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data9',Co,GL,Crcy,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(-LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF_Canada where source = 'R65' and YearPeriod > '201512' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,GL,Crcy,Source,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control_Canada where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201512' and (GL like '131%' or GL like '22%' or GL like '282%') and not GL like '2822%' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,Source union all select Co,GL,'' as Crcy,Source, 0 as Doc_Amt, 0 as LC_Amt, round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF_Canada where source = 'R65' and YearPeriod > '201012' and YearPeriod <= '201512' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,GL,'' as Crcy,Source,0 as Doc_Amt, 0 as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control_Canada where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201012' and YearPeriod <= '201512' and (GL like '131%' or GL like '22%' or GL like '282%') and not GL like '2822%' and not GL like '222%' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG_CAD ')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (co = '2300' and TP <> '[version]'  or co <> '[version]' and TP = '2300' or '[version]' = '(none)')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, BusCat, Contract,uwyr) (Select '[batchID]-data2', Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, BusCat, Contract, UWYR from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GL = '2879900' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1819900'
update TransX set BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2879900'
update TransX set BusCat = '31' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '20'
update TransX set Co = TP, TP = '2300' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2300'
update TransX set Contract = '57', TTY = '841' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2006' and PC = '4050200231'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt7,Amt8,Flex1) (select KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2), round(sum(coalesce(Amt1+Amt2,0)),2), round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2), round(sum(coalesce(Amt4,0)),2),round(sum(coalesce(Amt7,0)),2), round(sum(coalesce(Amt8,0)),2),'pass1' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC)

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,PC,BusCat,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data2',Co,GL,PC,ACD,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,PC,ACD, round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF where source = 'M12' and YearPeriod = '201012' GROUP BY Co,GL,PC,ACD,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,GL,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod = '201012' and (GL like '131%' or GL like '22%' or GL like '282%' or GL like '148%' or GL like '23%') and not GL like '2822%' GROUP BY Co,GL,PC,ACD,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,PC,ACD) b where abs(LC2_Amt) > 1 and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ')

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6) (select '[batchID]-data8',Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD from (select Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_QTD,round(sum(Doc_ITD),2) as Doc_ITD,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_QTD,round(sum(LC_ITD),2) as LC_ITD,round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_QTD,round(sum(LC2_ITD),2) as LC2_ITD from (select Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_QTD,round(sum(-Doc_ITD),2) as Doc_ITD,round(sum(-LC_QTD),2) as LC_QTD,round(sum(-LC_ITD),2) as LC_ITD,round(sum(-LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_QTD,round(sum(-LC2_ITD),2) as LC2_ITD from IR17_Other_Singapore where source = 'R69' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source union all select Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_QTD,round(sum(Doc_ITD),2) as Doc_ITD,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_QTD,round(sum(LC_ITD),2) as LC_ITD,round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_QTD,round(sum(LC2_ITD),2) as LC2_ITD from IR17_Control_Singapore where source = 'R63' and GL in ('nothing') GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD) b where (abs(Doc_QTD) > 1 or abs(Doc_ITD) > 1 or abs(LC_QTD) > 1 or abs(LC_ITD) > 1 or abs(LC2_QTD) > 1 or abs(LC2_ITD) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LS-SING')

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6) (select '[batchID]-data6',Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD from (select Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_QTD,round(sum(Doc_ITD),2) as Doc_ITD,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_QTD,round(sum(LC_ITD),2) as LC_ITD,round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_QTD,round(sum(LC2_ITD),2) as LC2_ITD from (select Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_QTD,round(sum(-Doc_ITD),2) as Doc_ITD,round(sum(-LC_QTD),2) as LC_QTD,round(sum(-LC_ITD),2) as LC_ITD,round(sum(-LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_QTD,round(sum(-LC2_ITD),2) as LC2_ITD from IR17_Other_Singapore where  source = 'R67' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source union all select Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_QTD,round(sum(Doc_ITD),2) as Doc_ITD,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_QTD,round(sum(LC_ITD),2) as LC_ITD,round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_QTD,round(sum(LC2_ITD),2) as LC2_ITD from IR17_Control_Singapore where source = 'R63' and (GL like '6%' or GL = '4498000') GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD) b where (abs(Doc_QTD) > 1 or abs(Doc_ITD) > 1 or abs(LC_QTD) > 1 or abs(LC_ITD) > 1 or abs(LC2_QTD) > 1 or abs(LC2_ITD) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LS-SING')
insert into TransX (KeyID,Crcy,Flex1,Yr,Period,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4) (Select '[batchID]',Crcy,Name,xfactor,DecimalPlaces,PAM,RSG,Notes from Crcy)
Update TransX set Flex2 = '05-CASH' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('805','808') and TransCode in ('T0008','T0014','T0048')
Update TransX set Flex2 = '05-CASH' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('805','811','812') and TransCode = ''
Update x set x.Flex4 = y.Descr from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on Flex2 = y.ID and y.Table_ID = 'W13 Grp2'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex2 = ''

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data9',Co,GL,Crcy,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(-LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF where source = 'R65' and YearPeriod > '201512' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,GL,Crcy,Source,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201512' and (GL like '131%' or GL like '22%' or GL like '282%') and not GL like '2822%' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,Source union all select Co,GL,'' as Crcy,Source, 0 as Doc_Amt, 0 as LC_Amt, round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF where source = 'R65' and YearPeriod > '201012' and YearPeriod <= '201512' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,GL,'' as Crcy,Source,0 as Doc_Amt, 0 as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201012' and YearPeriod <= '201512' and (GL like '131%' or GL like '22%' or GL like '282%') and not GL like '2822%' and not GL like '222%' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ')

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data10',Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,'' as Crcy,ACD,Source, 0 as Doc_Amt, 0 as LC_Amt, round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF_HudCAD where source = 'R66' and YearPeriod > '201012' and YearPeriod <= '201512' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,GL,'' as Crcy,ACD,Source, 0 as Doc_Amt, 0 as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control_HudCAD where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201012' and YearPeriod <= '201512' and (GL like '148%' or GL like '23%') and not GL like '232%' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source union all select Co,(CASE WHEN (Co = '2002' AND GL = '2310001' AND PC = '2202FR0347') THEN '2310000' ELSE GL END) as GL,Crcy,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(-LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF_HudCAD where source = 'R66' and YearPeriod > '201512' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,(CASE WHEN (Co = '2002' AND GL = '2310001' AND PC = '2202FR0347') THEN '2310000' ELSE GL END) as GL,Crcy,ACD,Source,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control_HudCAD where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201512' and (GL like '148%' or GL like '23%') and not GL like '232%' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG_HUDC')

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,(Yr * 100 + Period) as YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2005' and not '2005 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2005 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2005') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,(Yr * 100 + Period) as YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2007' and not '2007 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2007 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2007') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,(Yr * 100 + Period) as YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and not '2008 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2008 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2008') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,(Yr * 100 + Period) as YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Co in ('2003','2004','2006','4110') or Co like '22%') and not Co + ' ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select Co + ' ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where (Co in ('2003','2004','2006','4110') or Co like '22%')) ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR
[ReplaceConnString][LockDownConnString]

insert into IR17_LIC_HudCAD (Co,YearPeriod,Crcy,Co_Crcy,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,TP,UWYR,Contract,PC,PC_Desc,Program,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC,GL_Grp,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3) (select Co,YearPeriod,Crcy,Co_Crcy,round(-Doc_Amt,2) as Doc_Amt,round(-LC_Amt,2) as LC_Amt,round(-LC2_Amt,2) as LC2_Amt,TP,UWYR,Contract,PC,PC_Desc,Program,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC, 'RIP' as GL_Grp,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3 from IR17_CF_HudCAD where GL = '1310001' and Group2_Desc = 'Claims' and YearPeriod in (Select distinct Yr*100 + Period from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R65' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL is null
Update x set Crcy = y.Field1 From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Swap' and y.Descr = x.Crcy where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.GL = y.GL from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Yr = y.Yr and x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and y.GL = substring('[BudAct]',1,7) where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL  = substring('[BudAct]',1,7)

Update x set x.Crcy = y.Crcy, x.Period = y.Period from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Yr = y.Yr and x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Crcy = 'X' and y.GL = 'X' and x.Period is null and not y.Period is NULL and y.Ledger in ('IF','Z003','Z004','Z007','Z014','Z015','Z018','Z023')  where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY '

Update x set x.Crcy = y.Crcy, x.Period = y.Period from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Yr = y.Yr and x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Crcy = 'X' and y.GL = 'X' and x.Period is null and not y.Period is NULL and y.Ledger in ('LG','Z006','Z007','Z009','Z014','Z015','Z016')  where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '

Update x set x.Crcy = y.Crcy, x.Period = y.Period from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Yr = y.Yr and x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Crcy = 'X' and y.GL = 'X' and x.Period is null and not y.Period is NULL and y.Ledger in ('IF','Z003','Z004','Z007','Z014','Z015','Z018','Z023')  where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-SING'

Update x set x.Crcy = y.Crcy, x.Period = y.Period from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Yr = y.Yr and x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Crcy = 'X' and y.GL = 'X' and x.Period is null and not y.Period is NULL and y.Ledger in ('LG','Z006','Z007','Z009','Z014','Z015','Z016')  where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL  = 'X'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Crcy  = 'X'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and (GL like '2822%' or GL like '222%')

Update x set x.Flex6 = y.Flex6 from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Yr = y.Yr and x.CC = y.CC and x.CatCode = y.CatCode and not x.Period is null and y.Period is NULL  where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Period is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and (Co > '5000' or Co in ('2101','2102','2103','2500','4025','4030'))
Update TransX set Period = '12' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Period = '16'
Update x set x.Amt1 = x.Amt1 * 100 from TransX x inner join Crcy y on x.Crcy = y.Crcy where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and y.DecimalPlaces = 0
Update TransX set Amt1 = Amt1 / 10 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Crcy in ('BHD','JOD','KWD','TND','OMR','LYD','IQD')
Update TransX set Contract = Assgnmt  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Yr < '2022' and Co like '3%'
Update TransX set contract = 'UNKNOWN', UWYR = '2010' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and UWYR < '2011' and UWYR <> ''
Update TransX set contract = 'UNKNOWN' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and len(contract) = 8 and contract like '20%'
Update TransX set contract = 'UNKNOWN' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and contract in ('','US GAAP UW RESULT')
Update TransX set UWYR = '1959' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and UWYR = ''
Update TransX set UWYR = '1958' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and UWYR = '9999'

Update t set Co = '3030', Amt2 = round(Amt2*r1.Rate/r2.Rate,2) from TransX t inner join Companies c on c.Co = t.Co inner join CrcyRates r1 on r1.Crcy = c.Crcy and r1.Typ = 'S' and r1.EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from (select EffDate from CrcyRates where Typ = 'S' and Crcy = 'GBP' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]') a) inner join CrcyRates r2 on r2.Crcy = 'GBP' and r2.Typ = 'S' and r2.EffDate = r1.EffDate where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Co in ('3060','3100')
Update TransX set Stat = 'I', Flex8 = '', Flex2 = '', Flex3 = '', Flex4 = '', Flex5 = '', Flex6 = coalesce(Flex6,''), Flex7 = '', Flex9 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set x.Flex8 = y.Field1, x.Flex2 = y.Field2, x.Flex3 = y.Field3 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on substring(GL,1,3) = y.ID and TransCode = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'W13 GL'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not coalesce(TransCode,'') = ''
Update TransX set Flex8 = '10-CSH', Flex2 = '02-CLM', Flex3 = 'CASH' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) = '222'
Update TransX set Flex2 = '00-OPENBAL' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '100'
Update TransX set Flex2 = '05-CASH' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('804','806')
Update TransX set Flex2 = '06-CEDCOM' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '802' and TransCode in ('T0014','T0017','T0058','T0060')
Update TransX set Flex2 = '09-FX' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (TTY like '9%' or substring(GL,6,2) in ('96','98'))
Update TransX set Flex2 = '01-PW' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '' and TTY = '801'
Update TransX set Flex2 = '04-ACQ' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '' and TTY = '802'
Update TransX set Flex2 = '02-CLM' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '' and TTY = '803'
Update TransX set Flex2 = '05-CASH' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '' and TTY in ('804','807','808','809')
Update TransX set Flex2 = '01-PW' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('13','23')
Update TransX set Flex2 = '02-CLM' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','22','28')
Update x set x.Flex5 = y.Descr from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on Flex3 = y.ID and y.Table_ID = 'W13 Grp3'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex3 = ''
Update TransX set TP = (case when substring(FSitem,1,2) = '00' then substring(FSitem,3,4) else Fsitem end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1, Amt2 = -Amt2, Amt3 = -Amt3 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = 'H'
Update x set Flex7 = y.Assgnmt from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.Co = y.Co and x.Assgnmt = y.Flex6 and x.Contract = y.Contract and x.UWYR = y.UWYR where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Flex6 = 'self flip', Flex7 = 'self flip' from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Assgnmt = y.Assgnmt and round(x.Amt3 + y.Amt3,2) = 0 where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Flex6 = '' and x.Flex7 = '' and x.TTY = '806' and y.Flex6 = '' and y.Flex7 = '' and y.TTY = '806' and ((x.GL like '131%' and y.GL like '221%') or (x.GL like '221%' and y.GL like '131%')) and x.Assgnmt like '%$%'

Update x set Flex6 = 'self 806', Flex7 = 'self 806' from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Assgnmt = y.Assgnmt and round(x.Amt3 + y.Amt3,2) = 0 and substring(x.GL,1,3) = substring(y.GL,1,3) and x.Flex6 = y.Flex6 and x.Flex7 = y.Flex7 and x.TTY = y.TTY where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Flex6 = '' and x.Flex7 = '' and x.TTY = '806' and abs(cast(x.CatCode as int)-cast(y.CatCode as int))<3

Update x set Flex6 = 'self', Flex7 = 'self' from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Assgnmt = y.Assgnmt and round(x.Amt3 + y.Amt3,2) = 0 and substring(x.GL,1,3) = substring(y.GL,1,3) and x.Flex6 = y.Flex6 and x.Flex7 = y.Flex7 where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Flex6 = '' and x.Flex7 = '' and abs(cast(x.CatCode as int)-cast(y.CatCode as int))<3
Update TransX set Stat = (case when substring(GL,6,2) in ('94','95','96','97','98') then 'E' else 'I' end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Stat = 'E' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('990','991')
Update TransX set Stat = 'X' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and len(TP) = 4
Update TransX set Stat = 'X' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2999','3999')

Update x set Amt4 = y.DocBal, Amt5 = y.LCBal, Amt6 = y.LC2Bal from TransX x inner join (select Co,substring(GL,1,3) as GL,CC,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode,sum(Amt1) as DocBal,sum(Amt2) as LCBal,sum(Amt3) as LC2Bal from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = '' and Flex7 = '' and Stat = 'I' group by Co,substring(GL,1,3),CC,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode) y on x.Co = y.Co and substring(x.GL,1,3) = y.GL and x.CC = y.CC and x.TTY = y.TTY and x.UWYR = y.UWYR and x.Contract = y.Contract and x.TransCode = y.TransCode where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Flex6 = '' and x.Flex7 = '' and x.Stat = 'I'

Update TransX set Flex6 = 'self TP', Flex7 = 'self TP' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = '' and Flex7 = '' and Stat = 'I' and coalesce(Amt4,0) = 0 and coalesce(Amt5,0) = 0 and coalesce(Amt6,0) = 0
update TransX set Flex1 = c.Crcy from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.PCdesc = y.Descr, x.Division = y.Program from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set BusCat = (case when BusCat = '10' then 'D' else 'A' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Flex9 = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + x.BusCat + 'N' + (case when x.TP like 'F%' then 'A' else 'T' end) + 'P0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join pctrs p on x.PC = p.pctr inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = p.Product and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Flex9 = c.Portfolio_PC from TransX x inner join IR17_Contracts c on x.Contract = c.Contract and x.UWYR = c.UWYR and x.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not substring(x.Flex9,2,2) in ('UI','NL','EL') and not x.Co = '2999'
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'Premiums' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1310001' and Flex4 = 'Cash' and UWYR < '2015'
Update TransX set TP = '2308', Stat = 'X' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract = 'DAH' and TP = ''
Update TransX set Division = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division is NULL
Update x set Rate1 = c.Rate From TransX x inner join CrcyRates c on c.Crcy = x.Flex1 and c.Typ = 'S' and c.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Amt1 = Amt3, Amt2 = round(Amt3/Rate1,2), Flex3 = x.Crcy, Crcy = 'USD' From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Exp' and y.Descr = x.Crcy where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex9 = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '
update TransX set PC = 'UNKNOWN', Flex9 = '7UISCANTP0' where  GL = '2820000' and Co = '2300' and BusCat = 'A' and PC = ''

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,(Yr * 100 + Period) as YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2001' and not '2001 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2001 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2001') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,(Yr * 100 + Period) as YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2002' and not '2002 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2002 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2002') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,PC,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data11',Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,(case when GL_Grp = 'RCR IF' then 'RCR' else GL_GRP end) as GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(-LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_LIC_Canada where source = 'R64' and YearPeriod > '201012' GROUP BY Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source union all select Co,(case when GL like '%999%' then coalesce(coalesce(y.Field1,z.Field1),GL) + 'x' else  coalesce(coalesce(y.Field1,z.Field1),GL) end) as GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -Doc_QTD else Doc_QTD end)),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -LC_QTD else LC_QTD end)),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -LC2_QTD else LC2_QTD end)),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control_Canada x left join IR17_Tables y on substring(GL,1,4) = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'LIC' left join IR17_Tables z on substring(GL,1,3) = z.Descr and z.Table_ID = 'IR17' and z.ID = 'LIC' and y.Field1 is NULL where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201012' and (Substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','15','20','21','18','40','54') or Substring(GL,1,3) in ('283','284','287')) and not substring(GL,1,3) in ('148','149','208','209','182') GROUP BY Co,y.Field1,z.Field1,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,GL) a GROUP BY Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD ) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) AND NOT GL_Grp IN ('DAC','UPR') and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG_CAD ')

Insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, Amt1) (Select '[batchID]-data12',Co,GL,ACD,round(sum(LC_ITD),2) from IR17_Control_Canada where YearPeriod = '[Yr][Mo]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD ' group by Co,GL,ACD)

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,PC,BusCat,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data2',Co,GL,PC,ACD,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,PC,ACD, round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF_Singapore where source = 'M12' and YearPeriod = '201012' GROUP BY Co,GL,PC,ACD,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,GL,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control_Singapore where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod = '201012' and (GL like '131%' or GL like '22%' or GL like '282%' or GL like '148%' or GL like '23%') and not GL like '2822%' GROUP BY Co,GL,PC,ACD,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,PC,ACD) b where abs(LC2_Amt) > 1 and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LS-SING')

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,PC,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data3',Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,(case when GL_Grp = 'RCR IF' then 'RCR' else GL_GRP end) as GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(-LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_LIC_Singapore where  source = 'R64' and YearPeriod > '202112' GROUP BY Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source union all select Co,(case when GL like '%999%' then coalesce(coalesce(y.Field1,z.Field1),GL) + 'x' else  coalesce(coalesce(y.Field1,z.Field1),GL) end) as GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -Doc_QTD else Doc_QTD end)),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -LC_QTD else LC_QTD end)),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -LC2_QTD else LC2_QTD end)),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control_Singapore x left join [FX_Recon].dbo.Misc_Tables y on substring(GL,1,4) = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'LIC' left join [FX_Recon].dbo.Misc_Tables z on substring(GL,1,3) = z.Descr and z.Table_ID = 'IR17' and z.ID = 'LIC' and y.Field1 is NULL where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '202112' and (Substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','15','20','21','18','40','54') or Substring(GL,1,3) in ('283','284','287')) and not substring(GL,1,3) in ('148','149','208','209','182') GROUP BY Co,y.Field1,z.Field1,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,GL) a GROUP BY Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LS-SING')

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,BusCat,Amt1,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data4',Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Doc_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt, round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt, round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF_Singapore where source = 'R65' and YearPeriod > '201512' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_Amt, round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control_Singapore where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201512' and (GL like '131%' or GL like '22%' or GL like '282%') and not GL like '2822%' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LS-SING')

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data5',Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(-LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF_Singapore where source = 'R66' and YearPeriod > '201512' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source union all select (case when Co = '3060' or Co = '3100' then '3030' else Co end) as Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_Amt, round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control_Singapore where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201512' and (GL like '148%' or GL like '23%') and not GL like '232%' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,ACD) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LS-SING')

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,PC,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data11',Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt from (select Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from (select Co,(case when GL_Grp = 'RCR IF' then 'RCR' else GL_GRP end) as GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(-LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum(-LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_LIC_HudCAD where source = 'R64' and YearPeriod > '201012' GROUP BY Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source union all select Co,(case when GL like '%999%' then coalesce(coalesce(y.Field1,z.Field1),GL) + 'x' else  coalesce(coalesce(y.Field1,z.Field1),GL) end) as GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -Doc_QTD else Doc_QTD end)),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -LC_QTD else LC_QTD end)),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum((case when GL < '3000000' then -LC2_QTD else LC2_QTD end)),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_Control_HudCAD x left join IR17_Tables y on substring(GL,1,4) = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'LIC' left join IR17_Tables z on substring(GL,1,3) = z.Descr and z.Table_ID = 'IR17' and z.ID = 'LIC' and y.Field1 is NULL where source = 'R63' and YearPeriod > '201012' and (Substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','15','20','21','18','40','54') or Substring(GL,1,3) in ('283','284','287')) and not substring(GL,1,3) in ('148','149','208','209','182') GROUP BY Co,y.Field1,z.Field1,Crcy,PC,ACD,Source,GL) a GROUP BY Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,PC,ACD ) b where (abs(Doc_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC_Amt) > 1 or abs(LC2_Amt) > 1) AND NOT GL_Grp IN ('DAC','UPR') and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG_HUDC')

Update x set x.PCdesc = y.Product from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set PCdesc = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + x.BusCat + 'N-P0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.PCdesc and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,BusCat,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6) (select '[batchID]-data6',Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD from (select Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_QTD,round(sum(Doc_ITD),2) as Doc_ITD,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_QTD,round(sum(LC_ITD),2) as LC_ITD,round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_QTD,round(sum(LC2_ITD),2) as LC2_ITD from (select Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source,round(sum(-Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_QTD,round(sum(-Doc_ITD),2) as Doc_ITD,round(sum(-LC_QTD),2) as LC_QTD,round(sum(-LC_ITD),2) as LC_ITD,round(sum(-LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_QTD,round(sum(-LC2_ITD),2) as LC2_ITD from IR17_Other where  source = 'R67' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source union all select Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source,round(sum(Doc_QTD),2) as Doc_QTD,round(sum(Doc_ITD),2) as Doc_ITD,round(sum(LC_QTD),2) as LC_QTD,round(sum(LC_ITD),2) as LC_ITD,round(sum(LC2_QTD),2) as LC2_QTD,round(sum(LC2_ITD),2) as LC2_ITD from IR17_Control where source = 'R63' and (GL like '6%' or GL = '4498000') GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD,Source) a GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,PC,CC,ACD) b where (abs(Doc_QTD) > 1 or abs(Doc_ITD) > 1 or abs(LC_QTD) > 1 or abs(LC_ITD) > 1 or abs(LC2_QTD) > 1 or abs(LC2_ITD) > 1) and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not TPname is NULL and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY '
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not TPname is NULL and (GL like '149%' or GL like '2822%')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Ledger in (select LedgerGroup from LedgerGroups where Ledger = 'IF') and not Ledger = ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('222','232')
Update TransX set Amt7 = Amt3, Amt8 = Amt3, Amt1 = 0, Amt2 = 0, Amt3 = 0, Amt4 = 0, Amt5 = 0 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not TPname is NULL
Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'D' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '14%' or GL like '15%' or GL like '23%' or GL like '287%') and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '6%' or GL = '4498000')
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
